title: Cronos Group Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS Beats Expectations, Revenues Lag
text: Cronos Group reported full-year 2024 results with mixed outcomes. The company generated revenue of US$117.6 million, representing a 35% increase from the prior year. However, this figure fell short of analyst expectations by 2.0%. The company achieved a significant shift from losses to profitability. Net income reached US$41.1 million compared to a US$69.8 million loss in 2023. The profit margin expanded to 35%, and earnings per share came in at US$0.11, up from a US$0.18 loss per share previously. EPS exceeded analyst estimates. Looking forward, the company projects revenue growth averaging 11% annually over the next three years, outpacing the Canadian pharmaceutical industry's forecasted 8.0% growth rate. The company's shares are up 6.1% from a week ago, indicating positive investor sentiment following the earnings announcement.
